since_last: 62% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.19%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 62% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.32% · BTC +3.19% · Gold -0.24% · Nasdaq100 +0.66%. 62% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.19%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.19%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.29%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +12.57%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +12.57%, DELL +5.27%, MU +4.97%, ZBRA +4.49%, NXPI +4.14%. Laggards: SPCX -8.05%, AVAV -7.88%, MDB -4.84%, INOD -4.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -8.05% at $170.11
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -8.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
